scripts.docker:api:down: docker compose -f compose.api.yaml stop api && docker compose -f compose.api.yaml rm -f api
scripts.docker:dotnet-api:down: docker compose -f compose.api.yaml stop dotnet-api && docker compose -f compose.api.yaml rm -f dotnet-api
scripts.docker:web:down: docker compose -f compose.web.yaml stop api && docker compose -f compose.web.yaml stop web && docker compose -f compose.web.yaml down --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:dev:api:down: docker compose -f compose.dev.api.yaml stop api && docker compose -f compose.dev.api.yaml rm -f api
scripts.docker:dev:dotnet-api:down: docker compose -f compose.dev.api.yaml stop dotnet-api && docker compose -f compose.dev.api.yaml rm -f dotnet-api
scripts.docker:dev:web:down: docker compose -f compose.dev.web.yaml stop api && docker compose -f compose.dev.web.yaml stop web && docker compose -f compose.dev.web.yaml down --remove-orphans
scripts.docker:dev:status: docker compose -f compose.dev.api.yaml ps api dotnet-api && docker compose -f compose.dev.docs.yaml ps && docker compose -f compose.dev.web.yaml ps
